title: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules)
content:
RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules)


1️⃣. Character Creation (Week 1)
• Students choose from preset archetypes (a list of narrative/literary character types).
• OR they create their own character based on an existing or original archetype.
• They submit a description, personality traits, and a “class” (storyteller, rebel, scholar, etc.).
• They can upload a drawing, AI-generated image, collage, or description of their character.

2️⃣. Character Development (Weekly Integration)
• Every week, they apply course concepts to their characters:
• Example: Week on unreliable narrators? How does their character tell stories? Are they unreliable?
• Example: Week on symbolism? What object or image defines their character’s journey?
• Example: Week on Gothic horror? What would haunt their character?

3️⃣. XP, Leveling Up, and Unlockables
• XP is earned through:
